ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, admin, data analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "password_salt" TEXT /* Salt used for hashing the password */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time the user last changed their password */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_failed_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last failed login attempt */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile picture */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for additional verification */,
  "two_factor_enabled" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether two-factor authentication is enabled */,
  "device_list" TEXT /* List of devices associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the bookmark */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the bookmarked web page */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the bookmarked web page */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bookmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the bookmark was created */,
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the folder where the bookmark is stored */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the bookmark is shared with other users */,
  "share_url" TEXT /* URL for sharing the bookmark */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the bookmark */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the bookmark */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmarks_folder_id FOREIGN KEY ("folder_id") REFERENCES folders ("folder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "folders" (
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each folder */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the folder */,
  "folder_name" TEXT /* Name of the folder */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the folder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the folder was created */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the folder is shared with other users */,
  "share_url" TEXT /* URL for sharing the folder */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for shared folders (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("folder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folders_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "is_deprecated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the tag is deprecated */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the tag has been used */,
  "last_used" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmark_tags" (
  "bookmark_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark-tag association */,
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bookmark */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the tag association */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag association was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_tags_bookmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmark_id") REFERENCES bookmarks ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmark_tags_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the setting was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the setting is the default value */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the setting is locked and cannot be changed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "favicon_cache" (
  "favicon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favicon */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL associated with the favicon */,
  "favicon_path" TEXT /* File path to the favicon image */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the favicon was last updated */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the favicon file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* File type of the favicon (e.g., .ico, .png) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favicon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., search, click, form submission) */,
  "activity_details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* ID of the session to group activities */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device from which the activity occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user for security and analytics */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device information */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user for geographic analytics */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the user for geographic analytics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
